assertions.assertion: Output must address ownership ambiguity explicitly
assertions.evidence: Lack of ownership and discipline in code review process

assertions.assertion: Output must mention both CI systems by name (CircleCI and GitHub Actions)
Output must give at least one short-term action item that is actionable despite the chaos
Output must score Ownership & culture at 2/5 or lower
Output must not recommend a full team reorganisation
assertions.evidence: Lack of a full team reorganisation recommendation is not explicitly stated in the audit output.
